svg.title: LLM workflow integration architecture
svg.desc: A metadata-driven workflow engine where LLM calls are just another app type. The orchestrator dispatches by appType to the LLM adapter, which calls AOF to reach Claude, reads inputs and writes outputs through a shared artifact store, and gates downstream stages via attestation.

g.text: One workflowAppConfig per stage, keyed by appType

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the orchestrator dispatch by appType?')
sendPrompt('Show me the LLM_AGENT adapter code')
sendPrompt('What does AOF provide over direct Bedrock?')
sendPrompt('How does attestation gate downstream deps?')
